pages.text: The $(bold)Mechanical Press$() hammers whatever passes under it. On a belt or Depot it flattens ingots into $(bold)sheets$() and presses other items.$(br2)Put a press directly above a $(bold)Basin$() and you get $(create)compacting$(): the items in the basin are squeezed together into a new item — or, in Novus, seeds and glands squeezed into $(italic)fluids$().
pages.title: Pressing

pages.text: $(bold)Compacting$() is how you make blocks from nuggets, bricks from clay, and many modpack-specific results. The basin holds the ingredients; the press supplies the force.$(br2)It is the same recipe type the Traveler's Companion uses for seed-pressing and the Wetware Appendix uses for the Toxin Gland — one press over one basin, no heat required.
pages.title: Compacting
